captures.draft_raw:
{
  "plan_id": "plan_req_004_001",
  "request_id": "req_004",
  "planner": "research_worker",
  "objective": "Identify root cause of metrics aggregation overcounting active users on late session-close replay after checkpoint restore, apply safe fix with rollback plan, and verify with focused correctness checks",
  "strategy": "discovery-first sequencing due to unknown locations and medium ambiguity: observe targets and evidence before any design or mutation, enforce rollback and verification, stop on evidence gaps",
  "steps": [
    {
      "step_id": "step_1",
      "worker_type": "repo_worker",
      "instruction": "Discover candidate source files and locations for metrics aggregation job, session-close event handling, and checkpoint restore logic",
      "phase": "DISCOVER",
      "mode": "observe_only",
      "task_id": "metrics_overcount_fix",
      "input_artifacts": [],
      "output_artifacts": ["candidate_paths"],
      "max_tool_calls": 5,
      "max_model_calls": 1,
      "permissions": {"read_files": true, "write_files": false, "run_commands": false}
    },
    {
      "step_id": "step_2",
      "worker_type": "research_worker",
      "instruction": "Research root cause hypotheses for overcounting due to late session-close replay after restore using discovered candidates and envelope assumptions",
      "phase": "RESEARCH",
      "mode": "observe_only",
      "task_id": "metrics_overcount_fix",
      "input_artifacts": ["candidate_paths"],
      "output_artifacts": ["root_cause_hypotheses"],
      "max_tool_calls": 3,
      "max_model_calls": 2,
      "permissions": {"read_files": true, "write_files": false, "run_commands": false}
    },
    {
      "step_id": "step_3",
      "worker_type": "research_worker",
      "instruction": "Collect performance evidence and dependency manifest; produce evidence artifact or evidence_gap if unavailable",
      "phase": "ANALYZE",
      "mode": "observe_only",
      "task_id": "metrics_overcount_fix",
      "input_artifacts": ["candidate_paths", "root_cause_hypotheses"],
      "output_artifacts": ["evidence_artifact", "dependency_manifest"],
      "max_tool_calls": 4,
      "max_model_calls": 1,
      "permissions": {"read_files": true, "write_files": false, "run_commands": false}
    },
    {
      "step_id": "step_4",
      "worker_type": "code_worker",
      "instruction": "Design narrow mutation_scope, patch_scope from candidates; produce rollback_plan before any mutation",
      "phase": "DESIGN",
      "mode": "plan_only",
      "task_id": "metrics_overcount_fix",
      "input_artifacts": ["candidate_paths", "root_cause_hypotheses", "evidence_artifact", "dependency_manifest"],
      "output_artifacts": ["mutation_scope", "rollback_plan"],
      "max_tool_calls": 2,
      "max_model_calls": 2,
      "permissions": {"read_files": true, "write_files": false, "run_commands": false}
    },
    {
      "step_id": "step_5",
      "worker_type": "code_worker",
      "instruction": "Apply bounded mutation using mutation_scope and rollback_plan; output rollback_patch and change_summary",
      "phase": "MUTATE",
      "mode": "bounded_mutation",
      "task_id": "metrics_overcount_fix",
      "input_artifacts": ["mutation_scope", "rollback_plan", "evidence_artifact"],
      "output_artifacts": ["rollback_patch", "change_summary"],
      "max_tool_calls": 3,
      "max_model_calls": 1,
      "permissions": {"read_files": true, "write_files": true, "run_commands": false, "write_paths_from_artifacts": ["mutation_scope"]}
    },
    {
      "step_id": "step_6",
      "worker_type": "verify_worker",
      "instruction": "Verify mutation using change_summary, mutation_scope, evidence_artifact and focused aggregation correctness checks; output verification_report",
      "phase": "VERIFY",
      "mode": "verify_only",
      "task_id": "metrics_overcount_fix",
      "input_artifacts": ["change_summary", "mutation_scope", "evidence_artifact", "rollback_patch"],
      "output_artifacts": ["verification_report"],
      "max_tool_calls": 4,
      "max_model_calls": 1,
      "permissions": {"read_files": true, "write_files": false, "run_commands": true}
    },
    {
      "step_id": "step_7",
      "worker_type": "verify_worker",
      "instruction": "Produce final_report summarizing root cause, fix, rollback, verification results and any evidence gaps",
      "phase": "FINALIZE",
      "mode": "summarize_only",
      "task_id": "metrics_overcount_fix",
      "input_artifacts": ["verification_report", "rollback_patch", "change_summary"],
      "output_artifacts": ["final_report"],
      "max_tool_calls": 1,
      "max_model_calls": 1,
      "permissions": {"read_files": true, "write_files": false, "run_commands": false}
    }
  ],
  "execution_pattern": "discover_research_analyze_design_mutate_verify_finalize",
  "budget": {"max_tool_calls": 22, "max_model_calls": 9, "max_workers": 6, "max_retries": 2},
  "global_invariants": ["no_mutation_without_prior_discovery_and_evidence", "rollback_plan_required_before_write", "verification_after_mutation_mandatory", "stop_on_evidence_gap"],
  "success_criteria": ["root_cause_identified", "safe_mutation_applied", "rollback_available", "verification_report_confirms_fix"],
  "metadata": {"stop_conditions": ["evidence_gap_detected", "dependency_verification_failed"], "replan_triggers": ["mutation_scope_empty", "verification_failure"]}
}

errors.msg: plan phase order regresses at step index 2

captures.prompt: metrics aggregation job overcounts active users when late session-close events replay after checkpoint restore; identify root cause, apply safe fix, include rollback plan, and verify with focused aggregation correctness checks

repair_plan.objective: Identify root cause of metrics aggregation overcounting active users on late session-close replay after checkpoint restore, apply safe fix with rollback plan, and verify with focused correctness checks

steps.instruction: Discover candidate source files and locations for metrics aggregation job, session-close event handling, and checkpoint restore logic
Research root cause hypotheses for overcounting due to late session-close replay after restore using discovered candidates and envelope assumptions
Collect performance evidence and dependency manifest; produce evidence artifact or evidence_gap if unavailable
Design narrow mutation_scope, patch_scope from candidates; produce rollback_plan before any mutation
Apply bounded mutation using mutation_scope and rollback_plan; output rollback_patch and change_summary
Verify mutation using change_summary, mutation_scope, evidence_artifact and focused aggregation correctness checks; output verification_report
Produce final_report summarizing root cause, fix, rollback, verification results and any evidence gaps

repair_plan.strategy: discovery-first sequencing due to unknown locations and medium ambiguity: observe targets and evidence before any design or mutation, enforce rollback and verification, stop on evidence gaps

errors.msg: plan phase order regresses at step index 2

draft_plan.objective: Identify root cause of purge worker deleting legal-hold records on cache refresh race with pagination, apply safe fix with rollback, and verify via retention safety checks

steps.instruction: Locate source files for data retention purge worker, policy cache refresh logic, batch pagination, and legal-hold record handling
Analyze race condition between policy cache refresh and batch pagination in purge worker using discovered candidates
Design safe fix for identified race, produce mutation_scope, rollback_plan, and allowed_write_paths
Apply bounded fix using mutation_scope and rollback_plan
Run focused retention safety checks consuming mutation outputs and evidence
Produce final report summarizing root cause, fix, rollback, and verification results

draft_plan.strategy: observe-first discovery then targeted analysis, design with rollback, scoped mutation, and post-mutation verification
success_criteria: mutation_scope and rollback_plan produced before mutate

captures.draft_raw:
{
  "plan_id": "plan_req_015",
  "request_id": "req_015",
  "planner": "safety_planner",
  "objective": "Identify root cause of purge worker deleting legal-hold records on cache refresh race with pagination, apply safe fix with rollback, and verify via retention safety checks",
  "strategy": "observe-first discovery then targeted analysis, design with rollback, scoped mutation, and post-mutation verification",
  "steps": [
    {
      "step_id": "step_discover_1",
      "worker_type": "repo_worker",
      "instruction": "Locate source files for data retention purge worker, policy cache refresh logic, batch pagination, and legal-hold record handling",
      "phase": "DISCOVER",
      "mode": "observe_only",
      "task_id": "race_condition_fix",
      "input_artifacts": [],
      "output_artifacts": ["candidate_paths", "repo_inventory"],
      "max_tool_calls": 5,
      "max_model_calls": 1,
      "permissions": {
        "read_files": true,
        "write_files": false,
        "run_commands": false
      }
    },
    {
      "step_id": "step_analyze_1",
      "worker_type": "infra_worker",
      "instruction": "Analyze race condition between policy cache refresh and batch pagination in purge worker using discovered candidates",
      "phase": "ANALYZE",
      "mode": "observe_only",
      "task_id": "race_condition_fix",
      "input_artifacts": ["candidate_paths", "repo_inventory"],
      "output_artifacts": ["root_cause_evidence", "dependency_map"],
      "max_tool_calls": 4,
      "max_model_calls": 2,
      "permissions": {
        "read_files": true,
        "write_files": false,
        "run_commands": true
      }
    },
    {
      "step_id": "step_design_1",
      "worker_type": "research_worker",
      "instruction": "Design safe fix for identified race, produce mutation_scope, rollback_plan, and allowed_write_paths",
      "phase": "DESIGN",
      "mode": "plan_only",
      "task_id": "race_condition_fix",
      "input_artifacts": ["root_cause_evidence", "dependency_map", "candidate_paths"],
      "output_artifacts": ["mutation_scope", "rollback_plan", "allowed_write_paths"],
      "max_tool_calls": 3,
      "max_model_calls": 2,
      "permissions": {
        "read_files": true,
        "write_files": false,
        "run_commands": false
      }
    },
    {
      "step_id": "step_mutate_1",
      "worker_type": "code_worker",
      "instruction": "Apply bounded fix using mutation_scope and rollback_plan",
      "phase": "MUTATE",
      "mode": "bounded_mutation",
      "task_id": "race_condition_fix",
      "input_artifacts": ["mutation_scope", "rollback_plan", "allowed_write_paths", "root_cause_evidence"],
      "output_artifacts": ["change_summary", "rollback_patch"],
      "max_tool_calls": 3,
      "max_model_calls": 1,
      "permissions": {
        "read_files": true,
        "write_files": true,
        "run_commands": false,
        "write_paths_from_artifacts": ["allowed_write_paths"]
      }
    },
    {
      "step_id": "step_verify_1",
      "worker_type": "verify_worker",
      "instruction": "Run focused retention safety checks consuming mutation outputs and evidence",
      "phase": "VERIFY",
      "mode": "verify_only",
      "task_id": "race_condition_fix",
      "input_artifacts": ["change_summary", "mutation_scope", "root_cause_evidence", "rollback_patch"],
      "output_artifacts": ["verification_report", "safety_evidence"],
      "max_tool_calls": 4,
      "max_model_calls": 1,
      "permissions": {
        "read_files": true,
        "write_files": false,
        "run_commands": true
      }
    },
    {
      "step_id": "step_finalize_1",
      "worker_type": "verify_worker",
      "instruction": "Produce final report summarizing root cause, fix, rollback, and verification results",
      "phase": "FINALIZE",
      "mode": "summarize_only",
      "task_id": "race_condition_fix",
      "input_artifacts": ["verification_report", "safety_evidence", "change_summary", "rollback_plan"],
      "output_artifacts": ["final_report"],
      "max_tool_calls": 2,
      "max_model_calls": 1,
      "permissions": {
        "read_files": true,
        "write_files": false,
        "run_commands": false
      }
    }
  ],
  "execution_pattern": "discover_analyze_design_mutate_verify_finalize",
  "budget": {
    "max_tool_calls": 21,
    "max_model_calls": 8,
    "max_workers": 6,
    "max_retries": 2
  },
  "global_invariants": [
    "legal_hold_records_never_deleted_without_explicit_audit",
    "all_mutations_reversible_via_rollback_patch",
    "no_writes_without_prior_discovery_and_design"
  ],
  "success_criteria": [
    "root_cause_evidence produced",
    "mutation_scope and rollback_plan produced before mutate",
    "verification_report confirms safety",
    "final_report delivered"
  ],
  "metadata": {
    "stop_conditions": [
      "evidence_gap",
      "dependency_failure",
      "verification_failure"
    ],
    "replan_triggers": [
      "new_race_detected",
      "rollback_inconclusive",
      "safety_evidence_missing"
    ]
  }
}
captures.prompt: data retention purge worker deletes legal-hold records when policy cache refresh races with batch pagination; identify root cause, apply safe fix, include rollback plan, and verify with focused retention safety checks
